technical_replicate: no spermatozoa were observed in the replicate wet preparations.
experimental_design: comparison of homozygous knock-in mice and wild-type mice
homozygous knock-in mice harboring the orthologous CEP128R222Q variant show anomalies in sperm morphology
number_of_fractions: the peptides were first separated into 60 fractions by a gradient of 8–32% acetonitrile.
